ddls:
CREATE TABLE "acoustic_measurements" (
  "recording_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recording */,
  "aci" REAL /* Acoustic Complexity Index (ACI) */,
  "adi" REAL /* Acoustic Diversity Index (ADI) */,
  "bi" REAL /* Background Intensity (BI) */,
  "h" REAL /* Spectral Entropy (H) */,
  "hf" REAL /* Spectral Flux (Hf) */,
  "ht" REAL /* Spectral Temporal Contrast (Ht) */,
  "ndsi" REAL /* Normalized Difference Soundscape Index (NDSI) */,
  "np" INTEGER /* Number of Peaks (NP) */,
  "sc" REAL /* Spectral Centroid (SC) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the recording */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that recorded the data */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the recording */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the recording */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the recording */,
  "classification" TEXT /* Classification result from machine learning */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the recording */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recording_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_acoustic_measurements_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the sensor is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last maintained */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor model */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Current battery level of the sensor */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES sensor_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor model */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor model */,
  "sensitivity" REAL /* Sensitivity of the sensor model */,
  "frequency_range" TEXT /* Frequency range the sensor can detect */,
  "power_consumption" REAL /* Power consumption of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor deployment */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor being deployed */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the sensor is deployed */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the deployment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the deployment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the deployment */,
  "deployment_status" TEXT /* Status of the deployment (e.g., planned, active, completed) */,
  "deployment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the deployment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_deployments_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_deployments_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "environment_type" TEXT /* Type of environment (e.g., forest, urban, coastal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the location */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the location */,
  "vegetation_type" TEXT /* Type of vegetation in the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "acoustic_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each acoustic metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the acoustic metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the acoustic metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Formula used to calculate the metric */,
  "thresholds" TEXT /* Threshold values for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "recording_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recording being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the recording */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the recording was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_recording_id FOREIGN KEY ("recording_id") REFERENCES acoustic_measurements ("recording_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "recording_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recording the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure data integrity */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., WAV, MP3) */,
  "encryption_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the file is encrypted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_recording_id FOREIGN KEY ("recording_id") REFERENCES acoustic_measurements ("recording_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_maintenance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log entry */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "parts_replaced" TEXT /* List of parts that were replaced during maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_maintenance_logs_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)
